user.title: Find your PlayStation 5
user.description:
Leave the IP field blank to auto-discover your PS5 on the local network, or enter its IP address directly.

{discover_hint}

pick_device.title: Select PlayStation 5
pick_device.description: Multiple PS5 consoles were found. Select the one you want to add.

reconfigure.title: Update PS5 IP Address
reconfigure.description: Enter the new IP address of your PlayStation 5.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the PS5 at that IP address.
error.no_devices_found: No PS5 consoles found on the network.
error.invalid_pin: The PIN must be exactly 8 digits.
error.registration_failed: Registration failed. Make sure you entered the PIN within 60 seconds and that your PS5 is in Link Device mode.
